desc_cavendish_banana: Premium quality Cavendish bananas ideal for international export. Known for consistent size, taste and extended shelf life.
desc_red_banana: Sweet red bananas with creamy texture. High demand in Middle East and European markets.
desc_nendran_banana: Large cooking banana popular for chips and traditional dishes.
desc_baby_banana: Small sweet bananas, perfect for snacking and gourmet applications.
desc_tender_coconut: Fresh tender coconuts with natural water & soft kernel - export quality.
desc_green_coconut: Green coconuts rich in water content, ideal for juice and cooking.
desc_husked_coconut: Fully husked mature coconuts for copra and oil extraction.
desc_semi_husked_coconut: Semi husked coconuts retaining protective layers for longer shelf life.
desc_dehusked_coconut: Completely dehusked and polished coconuts ready for retail markets.
desc_watermelon: Large sweet watermelons, juicy and refreshing for summer export demand.
desc_black_diamond_watermelon: Premium Black Diamond variety – export grade organic, naturally grown.
desc_yellow_pumpkin: Bright yellow pumpkins rich in nutrients. Used in soups and curries.
desc_white_pumpkin: Ash gourd / white pumpkin known for medicinal and culinary uses.
desc_yellow_cucumber: Yellow organic cucumbers – hygienic processing, excellent shelf life.
desc_tomato: Fresh vine-ripened tomatoes for cooking and processing.

ai_greeting: Hello! 👋😊 I'm the SHASTIKA EXPORT ASSISTANT
ai_help_text:
I can help you with:
🌿 Product information
📦 Packaging methods
🚚 Shipping & logistics
📋 Export documentation
💰 Pricing queries

How can I help you today? 🌾
ai_export_info:
Sure thing! 😊 For agricultural exports, all products must meet international phytosanitary standards.

Key certifications we handle:
✅ FSSAI
✅ APEDA Registration
✅ Phytosanitary Certificate
✅ Certificate of Origin

Need help with a specific product? Just ask! 🌿
ai_quality_info:
Happy to help! 🌟 Our quality standards are world-class:

🔍 Grade A sorting & grading
❄️ Cold chain management
📋 3-stage quality inspection
🏷️ Compliance with importing country regulations

Every product goes through rigorous checks! 💪
ai_packaging_info:
Great question! 📦 We use export-grade packaging:

🍌 Bananas → Corrugated boxes with poly liners
🥥 Coconuts → Shrink-wrapped pallets & jute bags
🥬 Vegetables → Ventilated crates & perforated poly bags

All packaging meets ISPM-15 standards. ✨
ai_shipping_info:
Sure! 🚢✈️ Two shipping methods:

**Sea Way** (15-30 days) — Cost-effective for bulk
**Air Way** (2-5 days) — Perfect for perishables

We handle customs clearance & documentation! 😊
ai_thank_you:
You're welcome! 😊🌟 Happy to help anytime!

Have a wonderful day! 🌾✨
ai_contact_text:
Thanks for your question! 😊

For specific queries, you can:
📧 Email: kim.swathi.07@gmail.com
📱 WhatsApp: +91 96290 90961

Or ask about our products, packaging, shipping, or export quality! 🌾✨
chatbot_welcome:
Hello! 👋 I'm Shastika Chatbot – your export assistant at Global Air Tech.

I can help with:
🥥 Product specs & live pricing
🚢 Shipping & packaging info
🌍 Export destinations (7+ countries)
✅ Certifications & quality standards
💰 Custom quotes & enquiries
chatbot_products_list:

chatbot_shipping:
🚢 Shipping & Logistics

Sea Freight (Reefer):
• 20ft & 40ft Reefer Containers
• Temperature-controlled at 13.5°C
• 15–30 days transit time

Air Freight:
• 2–5 days delivery
• Ideal for perishables & urgent orders

Capacity:
• Daily: 2 × 40ft Reefer Containers
• Weekly: 10 × 40ft Containers
• Delivery: 2–5 days after deposit
chatbot_packaging:
📦 Export-Grade Packaging

Bananas:
• 5-ply High-Strength Telescopic Corrugated Boxes
• Sizes: 2kg, 4kg, 5kg, 10kg, 15kg, 20kg

Coconuts (Tender/Green):
• 9-piece cartons per box
• Diamond cut & polished

Vegetables:
• HDPE Crates | Net Bags | Corrugated Cartons
• 10–20 kg per package

Husked Coconuts:
• 25 pieces per jute bag
• Tamper-proof packaging

All packaging meets ISPM-15 international standards.
